title: Intense Bitter Jamaican Sirloin Steak Tips Kebabs
description: A crowd-pleasing Jamaican dish featuring sirloin steak tips with a bitter and molten flavor, perfect for a plant-based friendly dinner option.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together allspice, thyme, scotch bonnet peppers, soy sauce, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sirloin steak tips to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated steak tips onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the steak reaches an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Meanwhile, grill the diced bitter melon for 5 minutes, turning occasionally, or until tender.
Serve the kebabs with the grilled bitter melon on the side.
